title: Gulf India Crisis Resource Hub
story: Orchestrated a fully autonomous agentic workflow to build, deploy, and self-update an emergency resource hub for Indian expats during the 2026 Gulf Crisis in under an hour.
highlights: 408 visitors and 522 page views on launch day
139 organic referrals from Reddit within hours
Autonomous hourly monitoring with two-tier auto-deploy
Real-time crisis data for 9 embassies, 12+ airlines, 7 airports
